## Q 

- @smith_thread_2020, @smith_thread_2022
- @rosing_textile_2024  

## samling
> I intend to take pictures of plants and feed them to a machine-learning algorithm, which will then generate images of new digital vegetation based on the images I feed it. 
It knows what it means to be an image from the inside out, with no regard for the outside in.   
Working together with the machine-learning algorithm, I will weave and unravel artificial plant images on screen. A *Flora digitalica*, I told the committee. (@smith_thread_2022, p.10)

### vector space of plants
- embeddings: where in an n-dimensional vector space representing (nature) is one specific plant located?

### roboter schreibt bibel ab
(installation vor dem trierer dom)   

[https://www.robotlab.de/DE/biosbible.html](https://www.robotlab.de/DE/biosbible.html)

### 2011 website archived
- post-digital 2026: the :post: within the digital...
- Q: are there yet tendencies to create or use anachronist ways *of* the digital (methods) *within* the digital realm? i.e. a post-digital of the 2nd order?
  - that is: not to fall back into the analogue (ways, methods, media, tech) but to root back digital ways themselves within their own (ways)?

> [link extern](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links?title=rotefaden&ref=pages)

#### or any
pattern from whatever you find interesting (beautiful) to plot:

e.g.

- ich vs. du
- haben vs. sein
- past vs. present
- schund vs. high language (this may be difficult)
- you can as well plot 1 vs. n dimensions of features witch would result in a more colorful tweed
